page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel Story Book
text:
is a book for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game by GAINAX and Simple Text Production. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 23 February 1999. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047070262 

Overview

In this book, story and setting materials are present, EVA-related articles published in Comptiq magazine are included.
